adjustment_reason: Land-capacity model uses direct effective commercial hectares; legacy output-gap uplift is retired.
Reclassified the Cape fishing uplift as target-side rather than comparator-driven because the omitted horse-mackerel component is evidenced directly in the western pelagic history.
Kept the gold-mine slot at zero because there is no frozen target observation for a commercial gold-mine row in this state and the proposal registry does not defend one for the 1836-1936 horizon.

Retained a small whaling slot as an explicit exception because the frozen package still lacks a reproducible quantitative whaling anchor, but the reviewed coastal literature supports a real commercial whaling presence in this state footprint.
Potential-forestry model replaces observed plantation estate area with direct effective commercial forestry hectares.
Kept oil disabled because the package still lacks a frozen localized petroleum observation or a defended discovery chain for this state.
